key_points: The poem describes the poet’s feelings while listening to the rain falling on the roof at night.
It emphasizes the soothing and reflective quality of the rain.
The poet reflects on past memories and childhood while listening to the rain.
Themes include nostalgia, peace, nature’s calming influence, and reflection on life.
The rain creates a cozy, introspective atmosphere for the poet.
examples: The poet listens to the rain tapping on the roof and feels comforted.
The sound of the rain evokes memories of childhood and past experiences.
The poem contrasts the stormy noise outside with the peace felt inside.
exam_tips: Focus on the theme of nostalgia and reflective mood.
Remember the imagery of rain on the roof and its sound.
Note how the poet connects natural sounds with human emotions.
Pay attention to words describing comfort, coziness, and peace.
Be able to explain how rain triggers memory and reflection.
